entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes ascochyta blight

entities.description: The disease caused by the fungus Ascochyta rabiei

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: The ability of chickpea germplasm lines to resist infection by Ascochyta rabiei

entities.description: The process of evaluating germplasm accessions to identify resistant lines

entities.name: FIELD AND GREENHOUSE STUDIES
entities.description: The experimental settings used to conduct the screening process

entities.name: INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of introducing the pathogen using diseased chickpea debris

entities.name: SPRAYING
entities.description: The process of introducing the pathogen using a mixture of spores

entities.name: TEL HADYA, SYRIA
entities.description: The geographical location where the screening studies were performed

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Breeding programs aimed at incorporating resistance into commercial varieties
